findings:
## analyst-risk Report — GPU Extension Security Risk Register

**Window:** 2025-12-05 – 2026-03-05 | **Sources:** GreyNoise, Wiz Research, OX Security, NVD

### Risk Register (22 items)

| ID | Cat | Sev | Description | CVE | Mitigation | Status |
|----|-----|-----|-------------|-----|------------|--------|
| R-01 | Architecture | CRITICAL | Extension localhost HTTP exfil; sites steal dev files via port 5500 | CVE-2025-65717 CVSS 9.1 | No localhost HTTP; use VS Code message-passing API | OPEN unpatched |
| R-02 | CSP | HIGH | Markdown Preview webview JS injection; enables scan+exfil | CVE-2025-65716 CVSS 8.8 | Nonce CSP; enableScripts:false | OPEN unpatched |
| R-03 | Architecture | HIGH | Code Runner RCE via settings.json manipulation | CVE-2025-65715 CVSS 7.8 | Workspace trust API; never trust settings for exe paths | OPEN |
| R-04 | Architecture | HIGH | vscode-spell-checker workspace trust bypass RCE | CVE-2026-25931 | isTrusted check before GPU init | OPEN |
| R-05 | CVE | CRITICAL | Ollama API auth bypass; full model mgmt unauthenticated pre-v0.12.4 | CVE-2025-63389 | Pin Ollama >=0.12.4; localhost-only; firewall 11434 | MITIGATED by localhost |
| R-06 | Architecture | HIGH | Ollama SSRF via model pull URL injection; 91,403 attacks Oct-Jan (GreyNoise) | Active campaign | Allowlist registries; egress filter | OPEN |
| R-07 | CVE | CRITICAL | Ollama MCP execAsync command injection RCE | CVE-2025-15063 | Upgrade; sanitize MCP inputs | OPEN |
| R-08 | CVE | HIGH | llama.cpp GGUF vocabulary buffer overflow via malicious model | CVE-2025-49847 | Pin >=b5662; SHA256 verify; Ollama isolation | MITIGATED |
| R-09 | CVE | HIGH | llama.cpp GGUF integer overflow -> heap OOB | GHSA-vgg9-87g3-85w8 | Pin llama.cpp; Ollama manages lifecycle | MITIGATED |
| R-10 | CVE | HIGH | llama.cpp stack buffer overflow (Feb 2026) | CVE-2026-2069 | Monitor advisories; Ollama controls llama.cpp | MITIGATED |
| R-11 | CVE | HIGH | llama.cpp tokenizer integer overflow | CVE-2025-52566 | Pin >=b5721; sanitize token length | MITIGATED |
| R-12 | CVE | HIGH | Chrome Dawn WebGPU UAF -> RCE in Electron | CVE-2025-10500 CVE-2025-14765 | Keep VS Code updated; sandbox | OPEN Electron lag |
| R-13 | CVE | HIGH | WebGPU OOB write CVSS 9.0; Electron lags patches | CVE-2025-12725 CVE-2025-11205 | Disable WebGPU flag if unused; VS Code min version | OPEN |
| R-14 | Supply Chain | CRITICAL | VSIX secrets leak: 550+ secrets, 150K installs at risk from leaked publish PATs (Wiz Oct 2025) | None | .vscodeignore; gitleaks pre-publish; MS blocking mode | OPEN |
| R-15 | Supply Chain | CRITICAL | npm Shai-Hulud worm: debug/chalk + 500 packages; CISA Sep 2025 + Nov v2.0 | CISA advisory | Exact pinning + integrity hashes; SBOM | OPEN |
| R-16 | Supply Chain | HIGH | AI-branded malicious extensions (1.5M installs Jan 2026): code exfil to China | None | Extension allowlist; permission audit | OPEN |
| R-17 | Supply Chain | HIGH | Prebuilt GPU native binaries (node-llama-cpp) no code signing | None | SHA256 verify; prefer Ollama; source builds | OPEN |
| R-18 | Supply Chain | HIGH | VSIX auto-update hijack via leaked Azure DevOps PAT | None | 30-day PATs; CI vault only | OPEN |
| R-19 | VRAM | MEDIUM | GPU driver no VRAM zero-init; residual data readable cross-process | None | device.destroy(); avoid sensitive data in GPU memory | OPEN |
| R-20 | Architecture | MEDIUM | WebGPU-SPY cache side-channel 90% fingerprint accuracy | Academic | Use Ollama native backend not WebGPU | MITIGATED |
| R-21 | Prompt Injection | HIGH | LLM enumeration: 80,469 sessions Dec-Jan (GreyNoise) probing 73 endpoints | Active campaign | Localhost-only; rate-limit; alert pattern | MITIGATED |
| R-22 | CVE | MEDIUM | ONNX model directory traversal -> arbitrary file write | CVE-2022-25882 | onnxruntime >=1.24; validate paths | OPEN if ONNX direct |

### P0 Risks (Fix Before Any GPU Work)
R-14: .vscodeignore + gitleaks in publish pipeline — leaked PAT = supply chain takeover
R-15: Exact npm lock + SBOM — Shai-Hulud hit foundational packages (CISA alert)
R-05: Enforce Ollama >=0.12.4 check; reject if non-localhost binding
R-01: No localhost HTTP server pattern — CVE-2025-65717 unpatched, actively targeted

### P1 Risks (Fix Before GPU Features Ship)
R-02: Nonce CSP on all webview panels
R-12/13: Track VS Code Electron vs WebGPU CVEs; enforce minimum VS Code version
R-17: Native binary SHA256 verification in CI
R-06: Allowlist Ollama model registries; sanitize user-controlled pull URLs
R-18: Rotate to short-lived PATs in CI secrets vault

### Architecture Risks Eliminated by Ollama Out-of-Process
R-08 to R-11 (llama.cpp CVEs): Overflow crashes Ollama process, NOT extension host
R-05 (Ollama auth bypass): Localhost-only = CVE not reachable externally
R-19 (VRAM residue): Extension only sees HTTP text; no raw VRAM access
R-20 (WebGPU side-channel): Extension uses HTTP not WebGPU; inapplicable
R-21 (LLM enumeration): Localhost Ollama unreachable from external attackers

### Remaining Open Risks
R-01,02,03,04,06,07,12,13,14,15,16,17,18,19,22 — must be mitigated in extension code and CI/CD pipeline regardless of Ollama architecture choice.

### Key Intel (Sprint Window)
Feb 18 2026: CVE-2025-65717 (CVSS 9.1) UNPATCHED — localhost HTTP is live exploit target
Jan 8 2026: GreyNoise 91,403 Ollama attacks; professional recon active
Oct 15 2025: Wiz 550+ VSIX secrets; PAT hijack = instant supply chain compromise
Sep-Nov 2025: CISA npm alert; Shai-Hulud v2.0 hit ~500 packages
Feb 2026: CVE-2026-2069 new llama.cpp stack overflow appeared IN sprint window
recommendations: P0: Add gitleaks pre-publish gate + .vscodeignore for all dotfiles. Leaked VSIX PAT = full supply chain takeover (Wiz Oct 2025, 150K installs at risk).
P0: Lock all npm deps with exact versions + SBOM in CI. Shai-Hulud worm hit debug/chalk (CISA Sep 2025); GPU native addon chains are high-value targets.
P0: Enforce Ollama >=0.12.4 at extension startup; reject GPU init if Ollama binds to non-localhost. CVE-2025-63389 (critical auth bypass).
P1: Implement nonce-based CSP on all GPU extension webview panels. CVE-2025-65716 (CVSS 8.8 unpatched) + XSS->RCE chain is live attack vector in VS Code.
P1: Subscribe to ggml-org/llama.cpp advisories + VS Code Electron security releases. CVE-2026-2069 and CVE-2025-12725 both appeared this sprint window.
